author: y4rr
content:
Result: Phase 1B test infrastructure complete; all 6 candidate models REPORTED (not PASS) per pre-flight 'STOP-AND-REPORT if a clean model fails value-parity' rule.

Refactor: load_torchvision_state_into_resnet50 -> load_torchvision_state_into_module(model_label, &mut dyn Module<f32>, ...). Tolerance fixed from OR-of-max to per-element torch.allclose semantics. ResNet50 5/5 still pass (max_abs_err=4.482e-5, max_rel_err=1.038e-4). All 6 Phase 1B models: 5 ignored tests each (30 total ignored), each pointing to a fresh issue (#989-#994).

Findings: every Phase 1B candidate model is documented as 'simplified' in its src/ header — they intentionally omit BN, depthwise+pointwise, SE, h-swish, factorized convs, AuxLogits, dilation. The strict loader honest-fails on UnmappedFixtureKey at the first divergent torchvision state_dict key. This is failure mode #17 (bug-list completeness fallacy): the audit checked only for production-path data_vec/TensorStorage::cpu calls; structural divergence from torchvision's reference architecture is a separate failure class.

Per-model error (verbatim from cargo test panic):
  DenseNet121: 'features.denseblock3.denselayer12.conv2.weight' has no mapping → #989 (BN-free impl)
  MobileNetV2: 'features.13.conv.3.bias' has no mapping → #990 (no depthwise+pointwise, no BN)
  MobileNetV3-Small: 'features.8.block.3.0.weight' has no mapping → #991 (no SE/h-swish/depthwise/BN)
  EfficientNet-B0: 'features.4.0.block.2.fc2.weight' has no mapping → #992 (no MBConv/SE/BN)
  Inception-V3: 'Conv2d_2a_3x3.bn.bias' has no mapping → #993 (3-Inception-A simplified, no Mixed_5/6/7, no AuxLogits, no BN)
  FCN-ResNet50: 'classifier.1.bias' has no mapping → #994 (head naming + non-dilated backbone)

Diff:
  ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance_vision_models.rs: 846 lines (+/-)
  scripts/regenerate_vision_fixtures.py: 359 lines (+/-)
  ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance/fixtures_value_parity.json: 2743 lines (regenerated descriptors)
Binary artifacts (.safetensors, .bin) generated locally; .gitignored per existing rules; no commit. Coordination boundaries respected (no src/ changes anywhere).
